heading: About Me
paragraphs: Hi, I am Isadora (Izzy) Pinzer, I am an Interior Designer! I graduated in May of 2024 with a bachelor's degree in interior architecture from Endicott College in Beverly, MA. I am originally from North Andover, MA where I was very involved in the Music program as part of the Treble Choir and Concert Choir. I also love to spend time with my dog Bean and my family dog Lilac.

At Endicott, I enjoyed spending time in the studio which was a great opportunity to work on both academic projects, but also my own personal design initiatives. I was also part of the music community at Endicott and joined the Percussion ensemble my freshman year which allowed me the opportunity to express my creative musical talents. I was the Vice President of the Ensemble from Fall 2020 to Spring of 2023, and was the President for my final year. I also spend time in the kitchen being creative with my passion for baking.

In the Fall of 2021, I had the opportunity to spend my Fall Junior year abroad in Copenhagen with DIS (Danish Institute for Study Abroad). The 4 months in Copenhagen were truly amazing from an educational and personal perspective. I not only fell in love with Copenhagen and other European cities I visited, but became inspired by the Scandinavian design. Since returning, I have brought into my design work both the Scandinavian design along with other European influences.

One of my favorite aspects of the design process is rendering. I truly enjoy working in Enscape or Lumion putting my ideas into a 3D space with SketchUp or Revit.  I find using Enscape and Photoshop wonderful tools to make my designs feel as real as possible. I also hope to learn other programs such as V-Ray, 3D Studio Max and Rhino.
